case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. MELISSA E. CAMPOS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'S AMENDED MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND TOOK THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY, MATTER SETTLED. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-17-2009 - CASE SETTLED AS PER THE (CONDITIONAL) NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED IN THIS CASE. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON NOV-01-2011 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MELISSA E.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-15-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-05-2009 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR. MOVING PARTY WAS NOTIFIED TO RENOTICE THE MOTION IN THE LAW AND MOTION DEPT, 302. (206)
DECLARATION RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-01-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MELISSA E.

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MELISSA E. $3,243.58 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,263.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
